settings.heading: Meet Our Pros
settings.subtext: Trusted experts. Friendly faces. Learn from instructors who know how to build skill and confidence at every level.

settings.name: Single Lesson
settings.description: One-on-one session focused on your swing, stance, or any area you'd like to improve.
settings.ideal: Beginners testing the waters or advanced players fixing a specific issue.

settings.name: 4 Lesson Package
settings.description: Focused improvement across multiple sessions. Great for building rhythm and confidence without a full commitment.
settings.ideal: Golfers looking for short-term coaching or seasonal tune-ups.

settings.name: 8 Lesson Package
settings.description: Build lasting habits over time. Our most popular package includes a coaching plan tailored to your growth.
settings.ideal: Players ready for a consistent training journey.

settings.heading: Lesson Packages
settings.subtext: We offer lesson options for every golfer — from one-time tune-ups to long-term game plans. Choose the approach that fits your pace.
settings.disclaimer: All prices in USD. Applicable taxes added at checkout. Students will be paired with their preferred coach based on availability. Payment is due via secure link once the initial session has been confirmed by both the coach and student.
